ddls:
CREATE TABLE "opinion_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opinion category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the opinion category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the opinion category */,
  "category_order" INTEGER /* Order of the category for display purposes */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is active and can be used in surveys */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statement */,
  "statement_text" TEXT /* Text of the statement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statement */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opinion category the statement belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the statement is active and can be used in surveys */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the statement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the statement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statements_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES opinion_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statement being responded to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opinion category of the response */,
  "response_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of respondents with this opinion */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date and time the response was given */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the response was given anonymously */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES statements ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES opinion_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the respondent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the respondent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the respondent */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the respondent */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the respondent */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the respondent */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the respondent is active and can be contacted for future surveys */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the respondent was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the respondent's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opinion category the survey belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the survey is active and can be used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the survey was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the survey was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES opinion_categories ("category_id")
)
